initialGoal: Design comprehensive implementation plan for fixing all 16 strategic blind spots in Pulse autonomous email outreach system
actualOutcome: Completed all 7 phases of the strategic blind spots fix plan. Phase 4: ICP gate integrated into heartbeat + generator, role-based personalization from contacts table, Tanzania tourism seasonal awareness (seasons.ts), exemplar correlation with weighted selection based on reply rates. Phase 5: Revenue/ROI tracking in pipeline (deal_value on won), delivery metrics dashboard, dynamic send rate (auto-throttle on bounce/complaint), expanded dashboard with learnings + delivery views + --limit flag. Phase 6: PM2 ecosystem.config.cjs, graceful shutdown handlers in heartbeat, full README.md and QUICKSTART.md rewrite (removed all SMTP/Nodemailer references, accurate feature list). All passing tsc --noEmit + eslint clean.

data.goal: Design comprehensive implementation plan for fixing all 16 strategic blind spots in Pulse autonomous email outreach system
